positive: A minimalist and stylish illustration of a whimsical jungle scene. The main subject is a trio of abstract, stylized jungle animals (a playful monkey, a leaping tiger, and a curious parrot) framed within thick, clean-lined foliage. The style should be reminiscent of mid-century modern graphic design, incorporating flat color palettes with high contrast accents of teal, mustard yellow, emerald green, and burnt orange. The composition must be perfectly centered, utilizing negative space effectively around the clean silhouettes. The artwork should be optimized for screen printing, featuring crisp vector lines and solid, block color fills, with excellent contrast between the foreground figures and the background foliage. Perfect symmetry and highly graphic. Studio lighting, isolated on a pure white background.
negative: blur, grainy, low contrast, artifact, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, photorealistic, 3d rendering
